pages.text: Level System:$(br2)- 20 total levels$(br)- Requires killing mobs with activated elemental stone$(br)- Each level needs 100 more XP than previous$(br2)Bonus per level:$(br)- Ability damage increase$(br)- Strength effect (1.5 minutes)

pages.title: XP Values
pages.text: 1 XP:$(br)Zombie, Zombie Villager, Drowned, Husk, Vex, Slime, Endermite, Spider, Skeleton, Bogged, Stray, Silverfish$(br2)2 XP:$(br)Creeper, Enderman, Cave Spider, Wither Skeleton$(br2)3 XP:$(br)Guardian, Ghast, Piglin, Zoglin, Hoglin, Pillager, Evoker, Vindicator, Illusioner, Witch, Magma Cube, Phantom, Breeze, Blaze
5 XP:$(br)Elder Guardian, Shulker, Cursed Knight, Cursed Squire, Ravager, Piglin Brute$(br2)50 XP:$(br)Cursed Keeper, Energium Golem, Wither, Ender Dragon, Warden

pages.title: Rank System
pages.text: Ranks unlock at specific levels:$(br2)$(l)D Rank$() - Starting rank$(br)$(l)C Rank$() - Level 5$(br)$(l)B Rank$() - Level 10$(br)$(l)A Rank$() - Level 15$(br)$(l)S Rank$() - Level 20$(br2)Ranks enhance Master Effect tiers
